prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `a834deea`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `a834deea`. The rule is: find each 5x5 box whose border is all `0`, anchor a fixed interior stencil `1 7 6 / 4 0 5 / 2 9 3` one cell in from that box’s top-left, and write only into interior cells that are `0` in the input; interior `8`s stay unchanged.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint and discarded the sonnet hint. The sonnet summary overfit to connected `0` components and interior `8` “anchors”, which fails on the disconnected-interior case; that correction is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a834deea/notes.md). No new primitive was needed; existing DSL ops were enough. The generator matches the family by building square `8`-background grids with 1-4 non-overlapping 5x5 zero-bordered motifs and varied 3x3 `0/8` interiors, then deriving outputs from the same masked stencil.

Files are here: [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a834deea/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a834deea/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a834deea/generator.py), [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a834deea/notes.md). Artifacts are here: [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a834deea/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a834deea/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a834deea/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a834deea/previews/preview_02.png), [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a834deea/previews/preview_03.png).

Validation passed: official verifier `4/4`, generated verifier `1000/1000`, and the preview sheet was checked visually.
